xhtml:div.xhtml:strong: raylib is a simple and easy-to-use library to enjoy videogames programming.
xhtml:div.xhtml:p:
raylib is highly inspired by Borland BGI graphics lib and by XNA framework and it's especially well suited for prototyping, tooling,
graphical applications, embedded systems and education.
xhtml:div.xhtml:i:
NOTE for ADVENTURERS:
raylib is a programming library to enjoy videogames programming; no fancy interface, no visual helpers, no debug button... just coding in the most pure spartan-programmers way.
